task_completion.description: Verify that a category named 'Properties' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Properties' in the Categories list (Posts -> Categories) or selected in the category panel on the right side of the post editor.

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 1 is published with the correct title, assigned to 'Properties', and has comments enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a published post titled '8424 Bluebonnet Lane, Austin, TX 78758'. In the post editor or quick edit, 'Properties' should be checked as the category, and 'Allow comments' should be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 1 has the correct native custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Custom Fields' meta box below the post editor for Listing 1. It should contain: property_price (525000), property_beds (3), property_baths (2), property_sqft (1850), and property_status (Active).

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 2 is published with the correct title, assigned to 'Properties', and has comments enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a published post titled '1904 Ocean Drive, Miami Beach, FL 33139'. In the post editor or quick edit, 'Properties' should be checked as the category, and 'Allow comments' should be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 2 has the correct native custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Custom Fields' meta box below the post editor for Listing 2. It should contain: property_price (1450000), property_beds (2), property_baths (2.5), property_sqft (2100), and property_status (Pending).

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 3 is published with the correct title, assigned to 'Properties', and has comments disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a published post titled '755 Pinecone Ridge, Denver, CO 80204'. In the post editor or quick edit, 'Properties' should be checked as the category, and 'Allow comments' should be UNCHECKED.

task_completion.description: Verify Listing 3 has the correct native custom fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Custom Fields' meta box below the post editor for Listing 3. It should contain: property_price (485000), property_beds (4), property_baths (3), property_sqft (2400), and property_status (Sold).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) in a web browser, not terminal commands (like WP-CLI) or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify no external plugins were used for custom fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The custom fields should be entered in the default WordPress 'Custom Fields' meta box. There should be no evidence of plugins like Advanced Custom Fields (ACF) being installed or used in the sidebar/menu.

integrity.description: Verify the posts were actually created and published in WordPress.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Published' status, post IDs in the URL, or the posts appearing in the 'All Posts' list, rather than just text typed into a draft or external document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Category: 'Properties'. Listing 1: Title '8424 Bluebonnet Lane, Austin, TX 78758', Comments Enabled (open), Custom Fields [property_price: 525000, property_beds: 3, property_baths: 2, property_sqft: 1850, property_status: Active]. Listing 2: Title '1904 Ocean Drive, Miami Beach, FL 33139', Comments Enabled (open), Custom Fields [property_price: 1450000, property_beds: 2, property_baths: 2.5, property_sqft: 2100, property_status: Pending]. Listing 3: Title '755 Pinecone Ridge, Denver, CO 80204', Comments Disabled (closed), Custom Fields [property_price: 485000, property_beds: 4, property_baths: 3, property_sqft: 2400, property_status: Sold].
